final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic sports illustration for a basketball slam dunk moment.

Style/medium: dynamic anime illustration, sports manga style with bold ink lines and cel-shading, inspired by Slam Dunk and Kuroko's Basketball
Composition: low-angle dramatic shot from below the rim, wide-angle perspective emphasizing vertical leap, motion blur on trailing limbs
Subject: athletic basketball player mid-air executing a powerful slam dunk, muscular physique, intense facial expression, sweat droplets frozen in flight
Scene/backdrop: packed basketball arena, blurred crowd cheering with raised arms, multiple camera flashes popping, court floor visible below
Lighting/mood: dramatic arena spotlights from above, high contrast between lit player and darker background, energetic and intense atmosphere
Color palette: warm court orange as base, cool arena shadows, white flash bursts as accents, saturated anime-style colors
Materials/textures: crisp ink line art, smooth cel-shaded skin and jersey, glossy sweat beads, motion streak effects
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, 3D CGI look, deformed hands, static pose, muted colors, watermark, signature
